project_context.aesthetic: Quiet luxury, trust, exclusivity, dark-themed (black bg, gold accents, zinc-900 cards), Tailwind CSS, Shadcn UI components.

components.forms: Shadcn Inputs, Selects. Dark backgrounds (bg-zinc-950), subtle borders (border-zinc-800), yellow-500 focus rings.
components.buttons: Primary: bg-yellow-500 text-black font-semibold hover:bg-yellow-400. Secondary: bg-zinc-800 text-zinc-50 hover:bg-zinc-700. Ghost: text-zinc-400 hover:text-zinc-50.
components.badges: Status badges must use rounded-full, with 10% opacity backgrounds and colored borders/text (e.g., bg-emerald-500/10 text-emerald-400 border border-emerald-500/20).
components.tables: Shadcn Tables. Header: text-zinc-400 text-xs uppercase tracking-wider. Rows: hover:bg-zinc-800/50 transition-colors.

screens.name: Screen 1: Deal OTC
screens.description: Creation/Edit Modal or Page with a real-time calculator. High-end financial entry form.
screens.layout_blueprint: grid grid-cols-1 lg:grid-cols-3 gap-6. Left column (col-span-2) for the Form. Right column (col-span-1) for the Sticky Real-time Calculator.
features: Header: 'Criar Negociação OTC' with subtle gold accent.
Toggle: Buy (Cliente) / Sell (Fornecedor). Use segmented control style (Tabs).
Asset selector: Combobox (BTC, ETH, USDT) with crypto icons.
Quantity: Number input 'Quantidade'.
Reference Price: Auto-filled, editable, showing live price (e.g., 'Binance: $58,200' in green).
Condition: Toggle for 'Premium (+%)' or 'Desconto (-%)' + Input field.
Gross % and Net % inputs.
Commission Dropdowns: Corretor (Broker) and Membro KBEX.
Calculator Panel: A highlighted card (border-yellow-500/30 bg-zinc-900/80) showing Total Value, Gross/Net amounts, KBEX Margin, and Commission splits in real-time.

screens.name: Screen 2: Compliance Forense
screens.description: Forensic Qualification Tab inside a Lead/Contact detail. Deep dive into risk and verification.
screens.layout_blueprint: Bento-grid style layout. grid grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-2 gap-6.
features: Section 1: 'Carteiras de Negociação' (Trading Wallets). Table of submitted wallets, tags for Hot/Cold/Custodial, and blockchain type.
Section 2: 'Análise KYT' (Know Your Transaction). Risk score circle (e.g., 0-100), tags for flags (Darknet, Sanctions), textarea for Analyst Notes, status dropdown.
Section 3: 'Teste de Satoshi (A/B Test)'. Displays micro-amount generated, KBEX verification address, and a prominent 'Pending/Verified' status badge.
Section 4: 'Provas Fireblocks'. Two sub-sections for Proof of Ownership (Signed Typed Message) and Proof of Reserves. Use timeline or step indicators.

screens.name: Screen 3: Pipeline de Negócios OTC
screens.description: Table/card view of all OTC deals.
screens.layout_blueprint: Full-width page layout. Top toolbar with search and filters, followed by a dense data table.
features: Toolbar: Search by ID/Name, Select filters for Status, Asset, and Broker.
Columns: ID, Cliente/Fornecedor, Ativo, Qtd, Valor do Negócio, % Bruto, % Líquido, Margem KBEX, Corretor, Status, Data.
Status Badges: Rascunho (Gray), Qualificação (Blue), Compliance (Purple), Negociação (Yellow), Aprovado (Emerald), Executando (Orange), Liquidado (Cyan), Fechado (Zinc).
Row Actions: Dropdown menu (View, Edit, Advance Stage).

screens.name: Screen 4: Dashboard de Comissões
screens.description: Overview of all commissions generated and paid.
screens.layout_blueprint: Top: 4 KPI Cards (grid-cols-4). Middle: Split layout (1/3 Broker Summary list, 2/3 Detailed Table).
features: KPI Cards: Total Gerado, Pendente de Aprovação, Aprovado (aguardando pag.), Pago. Use gold/yellow text for the primary metric.
Broker Summary Card: List of top earning brokers with their total earned and pending.
Commissions Table: Deal ID, Beneficiário, Papel, Valor, Moeda, Status, Ações (Aprovar, Pagar, Rejeitar).
Bulk actions: Checkboxes on rows to 'Aprovar Selecionados' or 'Marcar como Pago'.

screens.name: Screen 5: Qualification Wizard Summary
screens.description: A step in the existing lead qualification wizard showing forensic compliance status.
screens.layout_blueprint: Centered max-w-md card, visually distinct with dark background and gold border accents.
features: Title: 'Resumo de Qualificação Forense'.
List items: Verificação de Carteira, Score KYT (Clean/Flagged), Teste de Satoshi, Prova de Posse, Prova de Reservas.
Use Lucide icons (CheckCircle2 in emerald, XCircle in red) for each row.
Footer: 'Status Geral' with a large badge (e.g., 'PRONTO PARA NEGOCIAR' in emerald or 'BLOQUEADO' in red) and a subtext for reasons.

backgrounds.description: Abstract golden splash on dark background

instructions_to_main_agent: You are designing the prototype UI for these 5 screens. Ensure the code is production-ready using React, Tailwind, and Shadcn UI.
The application is in PORTUGUESE. Ensure all text, labels, and dummy data are in Portuguese.
Theme is strictly DARK. Use 'bg-black' for the main app background, and 'bg-zinc-900' for cards/surfaces.
Accent color is Gold (use Tailwind's 'yellow-500' or 'amber-500' depending on contrast).
For the Deal OTC real-time calculator, use React state to dynamically calculate Gross, Net, and KBEX margin values based on the inputs to make the prototype interactive.
Include 'data-testid' on every button, input, tab, and row action.
Create a unified navigation sidebar or header to switch between the 5 prototype screens.
Use Phosphor icons or Lucide React for consistent, high-end iconography.
Avoid standard blue/indigo SaaS colors; stick to the Quiet Luxury palette (Black, Zinc, Gold, Emerald for success, Red for failure).
